metadata.endpoint_reconciliation_note: iter-4 isolates the two-track SET-COVER selection from sensible label-free selection. The primary_endpoint is keyed off the per-letter JOINT (E1 AND the unit significantly beating BOTH attribution (h)...

verdicts.selection_bar: unit AUC significantly above (CI excl 0) BOTH attribution (h) AND ALL THREE non-random count-matched selectors S_rec/S_prec/S_mag
verdicts.per_letter_E1_note: E1 PASS on 5/5 letters; fails on [].
verdicts.per_letter_E2_note: E2 (count-matched absorbed-slice recall) reported INDEPENDENTLY; E2 PASS only on ['T'].
verdicts.letter_I_annotation: firing-floor validation moved I's anchor off the 0%-corpus raw 1227 to 1634 (corpus fire=0.2064); E1 now PASSES for I -- the firing-floor fix RECOVERED I's absorption mechanism (the iter-3 bug it fixe...

legacy_iter3_verdict.why_replaced: over-aggregated: it required only E1 AND unit>both(h) AND RE-k on >=3/5, but RE-k is an easy floor (median draw AUC ~0.63-0.69, at/below the best single latent; frac_rek>=unit <=0.009). The honest obj...

legacy_iter2_view.iter2_endpoint_rule: WORKS = (E1 AND C1_AUC_point_win), E2 DROPPED from the conjunction

repro_appendix.torch_cuda_note: torch 2.8.0+cu128 (host RTX 2000 Ada / sm_89); iter-3 ran on RTX 5090 (sm_120).
